title: Resolution Extending Deepest Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Mr. Rommel Lapitan, Sangguniang Bayan Legislative Staff and Former Los Baños Traffic Management Officer in the Municipality of Los Baños Who Joined His Maker Last July 30, 2022. (AUTHOR(S) : Councilors Leren Mae M. Bautista, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Enedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N.
